title: Live Updates: Trump Lashes Out at Europe at NATO Summit
summary_full: President Trump assailed allies for not joining the war in Iran, called Spain “hopeless” and repeated his desire to control Greenland. His criticism cast a pall over a meeting critical for NATO’s future.
summary_public: President Trump assailed allies for not joining the war in Iran, called Spain “hopeless” and repeated his desire to control Greenland. His criticism cast a pall over a meeting critical for NATO’s future.

GL.label: neutral
GL.evidence: repeated his desire to control Greenland

IR.label: negative
